user.title: BMS Smart IR — add a device
user.description: How do you want to control it?

broadlink.title: Broadlink — add a device
broadlink.description: Name the device and enter the Broadlink remote's IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.50).

method.title: How to find the code?
method.description: There are {count} codes for {manufacturer}. Choose how to find the right one.

autodetect.title: Automatic scan (power sensor)
autodetect.description:
Select the power sensor the AC is plugged into. Each of the {count} codes is sent in turn; the one that raises power usage is taken as the match.

IMPORTANT: turn the AC OFF before scanning.

model.title: Pick a model / code
model.description: Choose a code to try for {manufacturer}. Available: {remaining}. If several match, test them one by one and keep the one that works.

test.title: Test: {model} (#{code})
test.description:
{status}

A test signal was sent. Did the AC respond (turn on / beep / change mode)?

finish.title: Save and place in a room
finish.description: Working code: {model} (#{code}). Choose a room and optionally link sensors.

tuya.title: Tuya — IR hub
tuya.description: Reuses the Tuya cloud account from your BMS Integration. Enter the IR hub device ID.

tuya_select.title: Select a remote
tuya_select.description: Pick a remote you added in the Smart Life app. Its category is shown next to the name. A test command will be sent next.

tuya_confirm.title: Test
tuya_confirm.description: A test command was sent to your {kind}. Did it respond? If yes, press Submit. If not, you can still finish and check the logs.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. For Broadlink check the IP/network; for Tuya check the BMS cloud account.
error.download_failed: Could not download the code file. Check internet or pick another code.
error.scan_no_match: Scan finished but no code turned the AC on. Try another manufacturer or pick manually.
error.no_remotes: No remotes found under this hub. Check the hub ID, that the remote is added in Smart Life, and that the IR Hub API is enabled.

abort.no_more_codes: No more codes to try for this manufacturer.
abort.no_bms_cloud: No Tuya cloud credentials found in the BMS Integration. Set it up with a Tuya cloud account first.
abort.already_configured: This device is already set up.

init.title: BMS Smart IR — sensors
init.description: Change the linked sensors for this device.
